# RigorLoop Claude Code Adapter

This file is generated adapter output for RigorLoop 0.1.0-rc.1. Do not edit this package to change RigorLoop behavior; edit canonical repository sources under `skills/` and `scripts/adapter_templates/`, then rerun `python scripts/build-adapters.py --version 0.1.0-rc.1`.

This package is independently installable by copying the contents of `dist/adapters/claude/` into a project root.

Reusable workflow skills are installed under `.claude/skills/`.

No default tool permission configuration is generated by this adapter.
